title: ATAH Profession Category
description: ATAH Registry Operation Profile object: profession category metadata record (spec/v0.8 Section 4.4). The `matching_weight_profile` weights MUST sum to 1.0; this is asserted in the description rather than enforced structurally because JSON Schema cannot express sum invariants. Required for implementations claiming Registry Conformance.

matching_weight_profile.description: Per-category weights summing to 1.0 across the four matching components. v0.8.2 (Phase 2) removes `inbound_referral_signal` from the profile per GKC-COMMENTS-01: connection records are kept for de-duplication only and do not feed matching. Phase 5 supersedes this whole field with `band_definitions` (stratified randomisation); the four-component model in this phase is a transitional state.

review_signal_weight_cap.description: Cap on the contribution of review-derived signals to band assignment. Retained in Phase 2; Phase 5 replaces this with `review_signal_band_cap` along with the broader stratified-randomisation refactor (per F-7).

referral_proposal_expiry_months.description: Default expiry for Component 3 referral proposals targeting professionals in this category, in months. Categories without a value use the protocol-level default of 6 months. v0.8.2 ships with 6 as the only populated value across categories.
